title: lycopodium selago var. varium
intro: Lycopodium selago var. varium is a variant of the Lycopodium selago plant, also known as the club moss, which belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family of plants. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Lycopodium selago var. varium include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Lycopodium selago var. varium can be prepared into herbal remedies, including tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
